黃昏村怪談 ・ 箱庭探索 ・ 卡牌對峙: Twilight Village Tales · Hakoniwa Explore · Card Confrontation
「天快黑了，這次，你不是一個人。」: "It's getting dark. This time, you're not alone."
鄉野奇譚 ・ 合作解謎 ・ 民俗怪談: Rural Tales · Co-op Mystery · Folk Horror
今晚，村子的主人是……: Tonight, the village is haunted by…
「最近村子裡不太對勁，你要小心。」: "Something's wrong in the village lately. Be careful."
「我信任你。我告訴你一個秘密……」: "I trust you. I'll tell you a secret…"
「那一夜的事，我會記得一輩子。」: "I'll remember that night for a lifetime."
手牌 — 點擊選中，再點出牌: Hand — Click to select, then click again to play
第一道晨光，終於穿透了薄暮。: The first morning light pierces the twilight at last.
你踏過了不該踏過的界線。: You crossed a line that should never be crossed.
最後一根蠟燭，靜靜地熄滅了。: The last candle quietly went out.
勇氣，是再次點燃燈火的力量: Courage is the flame that relights the lantern
再次觸犯禁忌可能導致遊戲結束。: Further violations may end the game.
你選擇逃跑……失去 1 燈火。: You chose to flee… Lost 1 lantern.
你過早鬆開了屏息……: You released your breath too early…
按住按鈕保持屏息。/應對突然出現的干擾，不要被發現！: Hold button to stay hidden. / React to distractions — don't get caught!
你保持了屏息，未被發現。: You held your breath and stayed hidden.
婆婆搖頭：『錢不夠啊……']: Granny shakes her head: 'Not enough coins…'
創建房間後，將生成一組房間碼: A room code will be generated for others to join.
輸入房主提供的 4 位房間碼加入遊戲。: Enter the 4-digit code from the host to join.
點擊相鄰的格子即可移動角色。每次移動消耗 1 點 AP（行動力）: Click adjacent tiles to move. Each move costs 1 AP.
如果追逐者靠近你，可以躲進建築物、神社或大樹中。: If the chaser gets close, hide in buildings, shrines, or trees.
每局遊戲都有一條不可違反的禁忌。: Each game has one taboo you must not break.
注意天色！從傍晚到薄暮，再到深夜: Watch the sky! From dusk to twilight to deep night.
天完全黑了。追逐者已來到牌桌前。: It's fully dark. The chaser has come to the table.
你和追逐者分別在環的兩端。: You and the chaser are at opposite ends of the ring.
點擊手牌中的卡片即可出牌。: Click a card in your hand to play it.
如果本局有神明在場，你可以消耗神明能量發動干預: If a deity is present, spend divine energy to intervene.
每局遊戲都有特定的破局條件: Each game has a specific victory condition.
追逐者就在面前！擲骰決定勝負: The chaser is right there! Roll the dice for victory.
畫面上的骰子會顯示你的勝率和結果。: The dice show your odds and results.
追逐者移動步數 +1。視野清晰。移動消耗 -1 AP。: Chaser move +1. Clear vision. Move cost -1 AP.
不主動說話，需用物品交換資訊。: Won't speak first; trade items for info.
躲著你，因為你是「被選中的孩子」。: They hide from you, the 'chosen child'.
欺騙、關門、甚至引追逐者來。: Deceive, shut doors, even lead the chaser to you.
村子半空，只剩老人與動物。: Half-empty village, only the elderly and animals remain.
行為隨機，對話內容真假難辨。: Random behavior; words may be truth or lies.
村民有時會「沒有臉」，需辨認真假。: Villagers sometimes have 'no face' — discern truth from lies.
每輪朝玩家移動 1-2 步。出牌時若「說出牌名」，移動步數 +1。: Moves 1-2 steps per turn. If you 'name the card', move +1.
雨天隨機降臨，雨中移動消耗額外 AP。水邊可發現隱藏物。: Random rain. Moving in rain costs extra AP. Hidden items near water.
每三輪下雨，玩家手牌數字模糊。: Rains every 3 turns; card numbers become blurred.
山區封鎖，靠近會被趕回。: Mountains blocked; approaching pushes you back.
每輪移動 1 步。棄牌堆滿 5 張時，將一張化為障礙物。: Moves 1 per turn. When discard pile has 5, one becomes an obstacle.
地圖上出現分身，偽裝成村民。: Doppelgangers appear on the map, disguised as villagers.
每輪移動 1 步。每兩輪複製玩家上一輪出的牌，放在環上。: Moves 1 per turn. Every 2 turns, copies your last played card onto the ring.
夜晚提前降臨，時間壓力更大。: Night comes early; time pressure increases.
頭部與身體分開移動，佔據環上兩個節點。: Head and body move separately, occupying 2 nodes.
地圖上出現你「上一局」的屍體，與之互動有特殊事件。: Your 'previous run's corpse' appears; interacting triggers special events.
每輪移動 1 步。每輪結束強制與玩家交換一張手牌。: Moves 1 per turn. Forces a card swap at end of turn.
地藏堂可作安全屋，回復更多體力。: Jizō hall is a safe house; restores more HP.
狐狸引路，可發現隱藏物品。: Fox guides the way; reveals hidden items.
打出【問】牌可額外窺視一張牌。: Playing 【Question】 lets you peek an extra card.
讓追逐者追擊一張假牌一輪。: Makes the chaser chase a decoy for 1 turn.
水井可洗滌物品；水田可隱藏蹤跡。: Wells cleanse items; rice paddies hide tracks.
全場下雨，重置所有環境效果。距離 +2。: Rain resets all environment effects. Distance +2.
大樹下可休息回復更多體力。: Rest under the great tree for more HP recovery.
村境石碑可傳送回村口。: Boundary stones teleport you to the village entrance.
交換追逐者與場上任一張牌的位置。: Swap chaser position with any card on the board.
某間民宅特別溫暖，可躲藏。: One warm house is especially safe to hide in.
創造一個安全輪：追逐者不行動，燈火不耗。: Creates a safe turn: chaser doesn't move, no lantern burn.
單輪消耗超過 3 AP 用於移動。: Spending more than 3 AP on movement in one turn.
環上移動超過 2 步。: Moving more than 2 steps on the ring.
出牌數字與上一輪出牌相同。: Playing the same number as last turn.
出牌時說出牌上人物全名。: Speaking a card character's full name when playing.
在水田、井邊格子停留。: Stopping on water or well tiles.
在地圖上找到並參拜 7 座地藏。: Find and pray at 7 Jizō statues on the map.
從村民口中拼出追逐者真名三個字。: Piece together the chaser's true name from 3 villagers.
打出 3 張【真】牌，並宣告完整真名。: Play 3 【Truth】 cards and declare the full name.
完成神明委託，獲得神明信物。: Complete the deity's quest and earn their token.
使用神明干預 3 次，且每次使用前曾打出【真】牌。: Use divine intervention 3 times, each preceded by a 【Truth】 card.
收集村民的怪談故事（越多越有利）。: Collect ghost stories from villagers (more = better).
與地藏、神明互動有額外選項；參拜地藏可回復隊伍體力。: Extra options with Jizō and deities; Jizō prayer restores party HP.
能讓狐狸、鴉引路；移動力 +1；能發現隱藏小徑。: Foxes and crows guide you; move +1; reveals hidden paths.
每輪可免費「窺視」一次；【逃】牌數字 +1。: Free peek once per turn; 【Escape】 cards +1.
能與神明直接溝通；初始神明能量 +1。: Communicate directly with deities; starting divine energy +1.
體力較高；能移開巨石障礙；對峙時體力代替部分擲骰。: Higher HP; can move boulders; HP substitutes for some dice rolls.
對峙時，自身出牌數字 +2；【咒】牌副作用減半。: Confrontation card number +2; 【Curse】 side effects halved.
水路可快速移動（消耗 AP 減半），但可能觸犯【不可入水】。: Water routes cost half AP, but may trigger 【No Entering Water】.
依山而建，有高低差。: Built on a slope with elevation changes.
山區需額外 AP 移動，有落石 QTE。: Mountains cost extra AP; falling rock QTE.
參道視野開闊、移動快，但易被追逐者發現。: Open view, fast movement, but easy for chaser to spot you.
室內外視野隔絕。房間可躲藏，但可能有野篦坊。: Indoor/outdoor vision blocked. Rooms to hide, but Nopperabō may lurk.
人多可混入人群躲避追逐。商店貨品更多，但價格波動大。: Blend into crowds. More shop goods, but volatile prices.
所有牌效果逆轉（距離 + 變 -，回復變扣減），持續兩輪。: All card effects reversed for 2 turns.
地圖上出現大量靈體，需躲避或面對。: Ghosts appear on the map; avoid or confront them.
環上插入 3 張鬼牌，每張使追逐者步數 +1。: 3 ghost cards inserted; each makes chaser +1 step.
視野大減，只能靠記憶或光源移動。: Vision greatly reduced; move by memory or light.
全暗兩輪，只能出【夜】牌。追逐者行動隨機。: Total darkness 2 turns; only 【Night】 cards. Chaser moves randomly.
全地圖下雨，移動消耗額外 AP。: Rain everywhere; movement costs extra AP.
村民聚集在神社/廣場，可一次對話多人。: Villagers gather at the shrine; talk to multiple at once.
可呼喚神明兩次（干預次數 +1）。: Call upon the deity twice; interventions +1.
持有【假】牌時，每輪追逐者移動步數 -1。: Holding 【False】 reduces chaser move by 1 per turn.
下雨時，你的非【水】牌不減數字。: In rain, your non-【Water】 cards keep their number.
對峙時你可選擇追逐者出的牌類型（選 Tag）。: Choose the chaser's card tag during confrontation.
每輪首次移動不消耗 AP。: First move each turn costs 0 AP.
死亡時保留 1 燈火，觸發後消失。: Survive death with 1 lantern, then this relic vanishes.
參拜地藏時額外回復 1 HP。: Praying at Jizō restores 1 extra HP.
水邊移動消耗 AP 減半。: Move cost halved on water tiles.
在大樹下休息時不被追逐者發現。: Resting under the great tree won't alert the chaser.
與孩童相關 NPC 羈絆提升速度加倍。: Bond with child-related NPCs twice as fast.
黑暗中視野不減。: Vision is not reduced in darkness.
下雨時每輪回復 1 燈火。: Recover 1 lantern per turn in rain.
揭示一條本局隱藏規則；所有【真】牌數字 +1。: Reveal one hidden rule; all 【Truth】 cards +1.
